Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWALOJAMENTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &AloSts1 = nullvalue(&AloSts1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &AloSts2 = nullvalue(&AloSts2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &AloSts3 = nullvalue(&AloSts3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) Form.Caption = ' Alojamento' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWAlojamentoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWAlojamentoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf AloLin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible AloUniProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible AloLotNro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible AloLotCic.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible AloDtaIni.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible AloDtaPreSai.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &AloIdadeWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible AloQtdUni.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &AloQtdMorWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible AloPsoMed.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible AloPsoGan.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible AloQtdDes.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible AloQtdMorLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible AloUniProBioMas.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible AloQtdRac.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible AloCAe.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(16).IsVisible AloSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(17).IsVisible AloDtaFch.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(18).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount AloSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Alojamento.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, AloCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Alojamento.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, AloCod) &Alojamentofazer.Clear() &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(1, 'Ficha Mortalidade') &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(2, 'Ficha Biometria') &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(3, 'Ficha Arraçoamento') &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(4, 'Ficha Qualidade') &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(5, 'Ficha Geral') If (AloDtaFch.IsEmpty()) &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(6, 'Encerrar Alojamento') Endif If (not AloDtaFch.IsEmpty()) &Alojamentofazer.AddItem(7, 'Abrir Alojamento') Endif Do Case Case AloSts = Status_Alojamento.Emproducao AloSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case AloSts = Status_Alojamento.DespescaParcial AloSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case AloSts = Status_Alojamento.Encerrado AloSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise AloSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase &AloIdadeWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &AloIdadeWithTags = trim(AloIdade.ToFormattedString()) If AloIdade > 2 &AloIdadeWithTags += format(!"%1", "Dias") EndIf If AloIdade = 1 &AloIdadeWithTags += format(!"%1", "Dia") EndIf &AloQtdMorWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &AloQtdMorWithTags = trim(AloQtdMor.ToFormattedString()) If AloQtdMor > 0 &AloQtdMorWithTags += format(!"%1", "Mortos") EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWAlojamentoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Alojamentofazer.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &Alojamentofazer = 1 Do 'Do FichaMortalidade' Case &Alojamentofazer = 2 Do 'Do FichaBiometria' Case &Alojamentofazer = 3 Do 'Do FichaArracoamento' Case &Alojamentofazer = 4 Do 'Do FichaQualidade' Case &Alojamentofazer = 5 Do 'Do FichaGeral' Case &Alojamentofazer = 6 Do 'Do EncerraAlojamento' Case &Alojamentofazer = 7 Do 'Do AbrirAlojamento' EndCase &Alojamentofazer = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Alojamento.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(AloCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoLotes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWLotes.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMortalidade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWMortalidade.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBiometria' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWBiometria.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoArracoamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWArracoamento.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoQualidade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWQualidade.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWAlojamento.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloLin", '', !'Linha', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloUniProNom", '', !'Tanque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloLotNro", '', !'Lote', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloLotCic", '', !'Ciclo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloDtaIni", '', !'Alojado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloDtaPreSai", '', !'Prev. Saída', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloIdade", '', !'Idade', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloQtdUni", '', !'Qtd Inicial', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloQtdMor", '', !'Mortalidade', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloPsoMed", '', !'Peso Medio', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloPsoGan", '', !'Ganho / Dia', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloQtdDes", '', !'Despesca', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloQtdMorLiq", '', !'Qtd Vivo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloUniProBioMas", '', !'Biomassa', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloQtdRac", '', !'Qtde Ração', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloCAe", '', !'CAe', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloSts", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"AloDtaFch", '', !'Despesca', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWAlojamentoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AloUniProNom1.Visible = False &AloLotNro1.Visible = False &AloLotCic1.Visible = False &AloSts1.Visible = False &AloLin1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' &AloUniProNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLOTNRO' &AloLotNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLOTCIC' &AloLotCic1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOSTS' &AloSts1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLIN' &AloLin1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AloUniProNom2.Visible = False &AloLotNro2.Visible = False &AloLotCic2.Visible = False &AloSts2.Visible = False &AloLin2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' &AloUniProNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOLOTNRO' &AloLotNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOLOTCIC' &AloLotCic2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOSTS' &AloSts2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOLIN' &AloLin2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AloUniProNom3.Visible = False &AloLotNro3.Visible = False &AloLotCic3.Visible = False &AloSts3.Visible = False &AloLin3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' &AloUniProNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOLOTNRO' &AloLotNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOLOTCIC' &AloLotCic3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOSTS' &AloSts3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOLIN' &AloLin3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' &AloUniProNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' &AloUniProNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FichaMortalidade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FichaBiometria' AtualizaTodasBiometriasdoAlojamento.Call(EmpCod,AloCod) AtualizaStatusAlojamento.call('INS',EmpCod,AloCod,AloUniProCod) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS168.Link(EmpCod,AloFilCod,AloCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FichaArracoamento' RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS169.Link(EmpCod,AloFilCod,AloCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FichaQualidade' RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS167.Link(EmpCod,AloFilCod,AloCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FichaGeral' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EncerraAlojamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WpecerrarAlojamento.PopUp(EmpCod, AloCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirAlojamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WpAbrirAlojamento.PopUp(EmpCod, AloCod, AloDtaFch) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"ALOFILCOD" &AloFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' &AloUniProNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLOTNRO' &AloLotNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLOTCIC' &AloLotCic1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOSTS' &AloSts1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLIN' &AloLin1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"ALOFILCOD", "", not &AloFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &AloFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &AloUniProNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloUniProNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLOTNRO' AND not &AloLotNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLotNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLOTCIC' AND not &AloLotCic1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLotCic1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOSTS' AND not &AloSts1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloSts1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ALOLIN' AND not &AloLin1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLin1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &AloUniProNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloUniProNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOLOTNRO' AND not &AloLotNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLotNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOLOTCIC' AND not &AloLotCic2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLotCic2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOSTS' AND not &AloSts2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloSts2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ALOLIN' AND not &AloLin2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLin2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &AloUniProNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloUniProNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOLOTNRO' AND not &AloLotNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLotNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOLOTCIC' AND not &AloLotCic3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLotCic3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOSTS' AND not &AloSts3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloSts3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ALOLIN' AND not &AloLin3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &AloLin3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Alojamento" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub //Sub 'CalculateTotalizers' // RetornaTotaisAlojamento.call(&Context.EmpCod,&TotAloQtdUni,&TotAloQtdMor,&TotAloQtdMorLiq,&TotAloUniProBioMas,&TotCount) //EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
